description: Internal sales performance dashboard — call volume, show rates, qualification, lead source attribution, compliance tracking, funnel economics

project_overview.what: The QS Revenue Dashboard pulls sales data from GoHighLevel (CRM) and turns it into a real-time performance dashboard. It tracks call volume, show rates, close rates, lead source attribution, rep-level performance, compliance, and funnel economics (RORI per rep once financial data is entered).
project_overview.why: Lloyd needs to see exactly how each sales rep is performing, which lead sources are producing revenue, and where the pipeline is leaking — without manually pulling GHL reports. This is the operational nervous system for the sales org.
project_overview.end_state: A comprehensive revenue intelligence platform with real-time KPIs, financial integration (Xero for actual revenue vs pipeline), automated anomaly detection, and API endpoints that feed the OpenClaw agent layer for cross-app synthesis.
project_overview.current_summary: Dashboard is live and in daily use across 5 tabs: Sales Performance, Lead Quality by Channel, Pipeline Intelligence, Funnel Economics, and Compliance. Xero invoice sync LIVE — Contract Value on P&L page updates monthly from actual ACCREC invoices with EUR→USD conversion. RORI columns display but require manual period financial inputs (Phase 2 will auto-pull from Xero). Show rate, compliance tracking, and lead quality distribution all working. Lloyd has real-time visibility into rep performance and pipeline economics.

resume_here: Whop Live Revenue shipped (2026-06-11, commit 15da8da): per-rep net cash + contract value on P&L tab now live. Historical contract value from Xero invoices (2026-06-10) gives Lloyd visibility into what was actually signed/invoiced vs. pipeline forecasts. Dashboard is live and in daily use across 5 tabs. Next phase: Phase 2 Financial Integration — auto-pull marketing spend + rep comp from Xero to eliminate manual Funnel Economics inputs.

current_phase.name: Phase 1 - Live & Iterating
current_phase.goal: Full internal dashboard for Lloyd to monitor sales team performance: call volume per rep, show rates, qualification breakdowns, lead source attribution, compliance tracking, funnel economics with RORI
current_focus: Phase 2 next: Financial integration (auto-pull Xero spend + rep comp)
immediate_next_steps: Monitor /xero/sync-invoices endpoint — check for EUR→USD conversion accuracy, invoice count alignment with Xero
Phase 2a: Create Xero accounting queries for marketing spend + rep comp per period
Phase 2b: Build /xero/sync-financials endpoint — auto-pull marketing spend and rep comp from Xero
Phase 2c: Modify period_financial_inputs panel — auto-populate from Xero endpoint instead of manual entry
Phase 2d: Add Xero Contacts (AP) verification — ensure rep names in Xero match GHL rep names for matching

known_issues.title: Funnel Economics RORI columns all show — until marketing spend + rep comp are entered
known_issues.resolution: Enter period data via the collapsible Period Financial Inputs panel on the Funnel Economics tab. Data needed: total marketing spend per period, per-rep total comp per period.

known_issues.title: Railway deploy requires manual subtree push — origin push does NOT redeploy qs-dashboard
known_issues.resolution: Deploy cmd: git push qs-dashboard $(git subtree split --prefix=qs-dashboard HEAD):main --force

next_phase.name: Phase 2 - Financial Integration
next_phase.goal: Connect Xero and WAP for automated payment processing and cash collection visibility — replace manual financial inputs in Funnel Economics with live pulled data
key_features: Xero API integration — pull total marketing spend and rep comp automatically per period
WAP integration — pull actual contract values and cash collected per deal
Funnel Economics financial inputs auto-populated instead of manually entered
next_phase.prerequisites: Accounting data manually validated first (Phase 1 manual entry). Confirm Xero field mappings match expected format.

future_phases.name: Phase 3 - Advanced Analytics
future_phases.goal: Deeper metric slicing, predictive insights, stronger management views, trend analysis
future_phases.prerequisites: Enough historical data for trends to be meaningful (4-6 weeks of synced data minimum).

recent_milestones.description: Whop Live Revenue shipped (2026-06-11, commit 15da8da) — per-rep net cash + contract value columns now on the P&L tab. Lloyd can see exactly what cash came in from each rep's closed deals vs. what was forecasted. Paired with Xero invoice sync (2026-06-10) which auto-pulls historical contract value from actual invoices. Dashboard now shows the full cash-flow picture: pipeline (GHL) + signed/invoiced value (Xero) + cash in (Whop). The two feeds (Xero historical contracts + Whop current cash) together give complete visibility into deal lifecycle from close to cash.

Xero invoice sync shipped and LIVE on Railway (2026-06-10). POST /xero/sync-invoices running in production. Contract Value on P&L auto-updates monthly from actual ACCREC invoices. EUR→USD conversion automatic. Category-scoped delete ensures re-runs never touch cash_collected rows.

Show rate numerator bug fixed across all 5 query files — compliance flags (outcome_unfilled, rep_compliance_failure) no longer gate the show count. showed_1st_call_expr() is now the sole show signal, correctly counting stage-based shows where rep moved stage without updating appointment status field.
Lead quality distribution columns added to Rep Breakdown table — Great / Ok / Barely Pass. / Bad / Missing counts visible per rep on Sales Performance tab
Pipeline Intelligence segment-by expanded with 4 new dimensions: Business Fit, Pain/Goal, Industry, Current Revenue — all sourced from existing GHL custom fields
Hover tooltips on every KPI label and column header across all 5 tabs — shows definition and formula on hover using fixed-position JS tooltip (bypasses overflow:hidden clipping)

Funnel Economics tab built — RORI per rep (Contract RORI + Cash RORI), period financial inputs panel (marketing spend + per-rep comp), cost-per-show/qual/close columns. New DB tables: period_marketing_spend, rep_compensation. All columns show — until data entered.
Date picker split into two independent From/To fields — removed flatpickr dependency
Weekly activity view now lets you browse previous weeks — see day-by-day bookings, shows, and qualifications for any week
Rep performance numbers are now clickable — see the specific deals behind each rep's bookings, shows, and closes, with direct links to GoHighLevel
Compliance tracking is live — see which reps aren't logging outcomes, which ones are writing low-quality notes, and disqualification rates per rep
Dashboard launched — key metrics, show rate trends, sales funnel visualization, and per-rep performance table all visible at a glance
First complete data sync from GoHighLevel — pulled in 3,243 deals with zero errors

decision_log.decision: Xero invoices are the authoritative source for contract value (not GHL projected_deal_size)
decision_log.reasoning: GHL projected_deal_size is unreliable — reps don't fill it in consistently. Xero ACCREC invoices reflect what was actually billed to clients.

decision_log.decision: Contract value stored as one aggregate row per month in revenue_line_items (source=xero, category=contract_value, product_type=invoiced_total)
decision_log.reasoning: Monthly aggregate is sufficient for RORI calculation. Per-deal invoice matching deferred to Phase 3 — adds fuzzy name matching complexity without changing the RORI formula.

decision_log.decision: Category-scoped DELETE before invoice upsert (not replace=True in upsert_revenue_line_items)
decision_log.reasoning: replace=True would wipe cash_collected rows for the same period. Category-scoped delete is surgical — only removes contract_value rows, leaving other categories intact.

decision_log.decision: Shared Xero helpers extracted to api/utils/xero_utils.py instead of xero_auth.py
decision_log.reasoning: xero_auth.py is already 1,107 lines. Adding to it risks further growth and creates router→router import coupling. New shared utils file is the clean boundary.

decision_log.decision: Show count numerator uses showed_1st_call_expr() alone — no compliance flag filter
decision_log.reasoning: compliance flags (outcome_unfilled, rep_compliance_failure) must never gate metric counts. A rep moving to the 'Call 1 Done' stage counts as a show regardless of whether appointment status field was also updated. Compliance flags are for separate compliance tab only.

decision_log.decision: RORI defined as Contract Value ÷ (Rep Comp + Mktg Alloc) for Contract RORI, Cash Collected ÷ (Rep Comp + Mktg Alloc) for Cash RORI
decision_log.reasoning: Marketing allocation per rep = (Total Mktg Spend ÷ Team Total Shows) × Rep Shows. This proportionally assigns shared marketing cost based on each rep's share of team volume.

decision_log.decision: Funnel Economics financial inputs are manually entered (not auto-pulled from Xero yet)
decision_log.reasoning: Xero/WAP API integration is Phase 2. Phase 1 validates the metric logic and UI with manual entry first. Once accounting data is confirmed correct, Phase 2 automates the feed.

decision_log.decision: qs-dashboard lives in monorepo locally but deploys from standalone qs-revenue-dashboard GitHub repo
decision_log.reasoning: Railway service was originally created from the standalone repo. Easiest to maintain — use git subtree push to keep qs-revenue-dashboard in sync with monorepo changes.

decision_log.decision: Sync runs hourly (incremental) with daily Fireflies appointment resolver at 7pm EST
decision_log.reasoning: Hourly incremental keeps data at most ~1.5h stale. Fireflies resolver auto-flips appointment statuses after business hours when all transcripts are ready. Weekly full sync on Sundays catches anything missed.

decision_log.decision: Show/no-show detection via union of appointment status + pipeline stage signals
decision_log.reasoning: No single GHL field reliably indicates show/no-show. Union of signals catches more cases than either alone.

decision_log.decision: Bearer token auth on all API endpoints
decision_log.reasoning: Simple, sufficient for internal tool. Upgrade to JWT/API key scoping when cross-app orchestration needs differentiated access.

accounting_data_needed.note: Required to activate Funnel Economics RORI columns. Collect from accounting call.
items: Total marketing spend per period (from Xero/bookkeeper)
Per-rep total compensation per period (base + commission + bonuses)
Actual signed contract value per closed deal (should be in GHL monetary_value — verify reps are filling it in)
Cash collected per closed deal (from WAP/Stripe refund reports)
Optional: refunds/chargebacks per period to adjust effective cash collected

tech_stack.stripe: Read-only charge/customer lookups only — no webhooks, no writes
tech_stack.integrations: GHL (deal sync), Xero (invoice matching), Stripe (revenue), Wise (payouts), Whop
tech_stack.shared_repo: Geri also pushes to lloyd-yip/qs-revenue-dashboard — NEVER force-push

hard_constraints: Routes → Services/DB. No direct DB calls in route handlers.
Stripe is READ-ONLY. No webhook handler. No write operations. Never add without signature verification.
NEVER force-push to qs-dashboard remote. Always git fetch before pushing. If rejected: fetch and merge.
Bearer token auth on all endpoints.
All OAuth secrets and API keys in environment variables only.
Alembic migrations must be reversible — write down migration before running up.
